title: [Tacz] Applied Ammo Box
description: Added ammo boxes that can be pulled from ME storage
body:
# Applied Ammo Box

Is your inventory full of bullets?  
Is there too little in the ammo box?  
Starting today, I'll say goodbye to those worries.  
This mod add "Wireless Ammo Box".  
This item will link with the AE2 warehouse and allow you to directly pull out bullets when reloading!

# How to use

1.  Create a wireless ammo box. See JEI for recipe.
2.  Link with wireless access point
3.  put in inventory

**This alone will save you from inventory pressure!**
